title: Technical Support Engineer (Polymer / Injection Molding)
description:
Industry: Petrochemical
MNC Environment
Exciting career opportunity

Responsibilities:

  • Provide overall technical solutions to customers which are not limited to company’s products only but also the inclusion of tooling, and part design analysis i.e – CAE, and injection molding
  • Conduct market research on the latest technology trends related to the company’s current or future targeted applications
  • Plan and work together with the commercial team to create a mid-term plan as well as long-term plan business strategy on target application
  • Provide solution and technical support to the commercial team in meeting short-term budget targets
  • Plan and evaluate analysis methods about actual application requirements and needs to provide actual data to customers for application development
  • Obtain actual application requirements and translate these technical requirements into actual material properties for R&D to formulate new material.
  • Provide support in negotiating newly formulated material technical properties limitation with customers on specific application needs & requirements
  • Provide technical marketing activities in developing new markets and/or customers.
  • Provide technical training to all business partners such as Traders and/or Distributors on Engineering Polymer, technical training will be also extended to customers as and when requested.
  • Organized trade show to enhance product brand marketing.
  • Conducting molding trials with customers

Requirements:

  • Knowledge in Polymer / Plastics is a must
  • Polymer stream graduate (Dip and above) *Chemical Graduate will be consider as well*
  • Knowledge with minimum 3 yrs experience in plastics injection molding and experience of chemical analysis for plastics or chemicals
  • Frequent travelling will be required for this position
  • Good knowledge with Microsoft excel and power point presentation will be an advantage

Job ID: V665V698

All Successful candidates can expect a very competitive remuneration package and a comprehensive range of benefits.

Kindly email your resume in a detailed Word format to carlo@peopleprofilers.com

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified


People Profilers Pte Ltd

20 Cecil Street, #08-09 PLUS Building Singapore 049705

+65 6950 9747

Registration Number: R1100011

EA Personnel: Carlo Antonio Dela Cruz

What differentiates People Profilers from every other recruiter is our unwavering commitment to building relationships with our clients- understanding exactly what our clients are after, and allowing us to match their precise needs. We deliver human capital solutions that allow organisations and their employees to succeed.

 

Here at People Profilers, we pride ourselves on being a one-stop human capital solutions provider for your organisation. Our innovative and relationship-focused workforce solutions have been provided across a wide range of industries.
